Group 1.text:
curl -LSs "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/bcrtvkcs/KernelSU-Next/refs/heads/legacy/kernel/setup.sh" | bash -s legacy

synckernel

reposync

buildlemonadep


git remote add crdroid https://github.com/crdroidandroid/android_kernel_oneplus_sm8350.git

git fetch crdroid 16.0

git merge -s ours crdroid/16.0 -m "Sync history with upstream crdroid"

git push origin 16.0


git fetch upstream legacy

git merge -s ours upstream/legacy -m "Sync history with upstream KernelSU-Next"

git push --force origin legacy


git remote add upstream https://gitlab.com/simonpunk/susfs4ksu.git

git fetch upstream

git checkout gki-android16-6.12

git rebase upstream/gki-android16-6.12

git push origin gki-android16-6.12

git checkout gki-android16-5.4


sudo vmware-toolbox-cmd disk shrink /


nuclei -u http://localhost/aeronix.com.tr/index.htm -tags misconfiguration,exposure,file,technologies,generic -rl 150 -c 50
